title: BPHZ renormalisation and vanishing subcriticality asymptotics of the   fractional $\Phi^3_d$ model
comment:
52 pages, 4 figures. Extended discussion of the results. Final
  version, to appear in Stochastics and Partial Differential Equations:
  Analysis and Computations
summary:
We consider stochastic PDEs on the $d$-dimensional torus with fractional
Laplacian of parameter $\rho\in(0,2]$, quadratic nonlinearity and driven by
space-time white noise. These equations are known to be locally subcritical,
and thus amenable to the theory of regularity structures, if and only if $\rho
> d/3$. Using a series of recent results by the second named author, A.
Chandra, I. Chevyrev, M. Hairer and L. Zambotti, we obtain precise asymptotics
on the renormalisation counterterms as the mollification parameter
$\varepsilon$ becomes small and $\rho$ approaches its critical value. In
particular, we show that the counterterms behave like a negative power of
$\varepsilon$ if $\varepsilon$ is superexponentially small in $(\rho-d/3)$, and
are otherwise of order $\log(\varepsilon^{-1})$. This work also serves as an
illustration of the general theory of BPHZ renormalisation in a relatively
simple situation.

AI.tldr: 研究了分数阶拉普拉斯驱动的随机PDE在临界参数附近的精确重整化渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究d维环面上分数阶拉普拉斯参数ρ∈(0,2]的随机PDE，具有二次非线性和时空白噪声驱动。这些方程在ρ > d/3时是局部次临界的，适用于正则结构理论。本文关注当正则化参数ε趋于0且ρ接近临界值d/3时的重整化行为。
AI.techniques: 使用正则结构理论，特别是基于第二作者、A. Chandra、I. Chevyrev、M. Hairer和L. Zambotti近期结果的BPHZ重整化理论，分析重整化反项的精确渐近行为。
AI.main_theorems: 获得了重整化反项在ε趋于0且ρ接近临界值d/3时的精确渐近：当ε在(ρ-d/3)中呈超指数小时，反项表现为ε的负幂次；否则为log(ε⁻¹)阶。
AI.significance: 提供了临界参数附近重整化行为的精确描述，展示了BPHZ重整化理论在相对简单情况下的应用，对理解随机PDE在临界区域的行为有重要意义。

title: Asymptotic behavior of a three-dimensional haptotactic cross-diffusion   system modeling oncolytic virotherapy
summary:
This paper deals with an initial-boundary value problem for a doubly
haptotactic cross-diffusion system arising from the oncolytic virotherapy
\begin{equation*} \left\{ \begin{array}{lll} u_t=\Delta u-\nabla \cdot(u\nabla
v)+\mu u(1-u)-uz,\\ v_t=-(u+w)v,\\ w_t=\Delta w-\nabla \cdot(w\nabla v)-w+uz,\\
z_t=D_z\Delta z-z-uz+\beta w, \end{array} \right. \end{equation*} in a smoothly
bounded domain $\Omega\subset \mathbb{R}^3$ with $\beta>0$,~$\mu>0$ and
$D_z>0$. Based on a self-map argument,
  it is shown that under the assumption $\beta \max
\{1,\|u_0\|_{L^{\infty}(\Omega)}\}< 1+ (1+\frac1{\min_{x\in
\Omega}u_0(x)})^{-1}$, this problem possesses a uniquely determined global
classical solution $(u,v,w,z)$ for certain type of small data
$(u_0,v_0,w_0,z_0)$. Moreover, $(u,v,w,z)$ is globally bounded and
exponentially stabilizes towards its spatially homogeneous equilibrium
  %constant equilibrium
  $(1,0,0,0)$ as $t\rightarrow \infty$.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了在特定小数据条件下，描述溶瘤病毒治疗的三维双趋化交叉扩散系统存在唯一全局经典解，且解全局有界并指数稳定于平衡态(1,0,0,0)。
AI.motivation: 研究溶瘤病毒治疗中的数学模型，该系统包含肿瘤细胞、病毒、感染细胞和细胞外基质等成分的双趋化交叉扩散动力学，旨在理解治疗过程中各成分的时空演化规律。
AI.techniques: 基于自映射论证(self-map argument)，利用小数据假设和参数条件，通过分析系统在三维有界区域中的初边值问题，建立解的全局存在性、唯一性和正则性。
AI.main_theorems: 在参数条件βmax{1,‖u₀‖_{L^∞}} < 1+(1+1/min u₀)^{-1}下，对特定类型的小初值，系统存在唯一全局经典解，且解全局有界并指数收敛于空间齐次平衡态(1,0,0,0)。
AI.significance: 为溶瘤病毒治疗的数学模型提供了严格的数学分析框架，证明了治疗过程中系统趋向于肿瘤细胞被清除的稳定状态，对理解病毒治疗的动力学行为具有理论意义。

title: Solutions to the Fifth-Order KP II Equation Scatter
summary:
The fifth-order KP II equation $$ \partial_t u + \alpha \partial_x^3 u +
\beta \partial_x^5 u + u \partial_x u + \partial_x^{-1} \partial_y^2u=0$$
($\beta<0$, $\alpha>0$) is a nonlinear dispersive equation that models long
dispersive waves in two space dimensions. We prove that solutions of the
fifth-order KP II equation scatter to solutions of the corresponding linear
equation $$ \partial_t v + \alpha\partial_x^3 v + \beta\partial_x^5 v +
\partial_x^{-1} \partial_y^2 v = 0$$ for small data. Our proof uses builds on
Hadac, Herr, and Koch's work (see ArXiv:0708.2011) on the third-order KP II
equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了五阶KP II方程在小初值条件下解会散射到相应线性方程的解
AI.motivation: 五阶KP II方程是描述二维空间中长色散波的非线性色散方程，研究其解的散射行为对于理解该方程的长期动力学性质具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 基于Hadac, Herr和Koch关于三阶KP II方程的工作，使用非线性色散方程的散射理论方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了五阶KP II方程在小初值条件下，其解会渐近收敛（散射）到相应线性方程的解
AI.significance: 扩展了KP II方程的散射理论到更高阶情形，为理解五阶KP方程的长期行为提供了理论基础，对非线性色散波理论有重要贡献

title: Gradient Flow Solutions For Porous Medium Equations with Nonlocal   L\'{e}vy-type Pressure
comment: 46 pages, Published in Calculus of Variation and PDEs
summary:
We study a porous medium-type equation whose pressure is given by a nonlocal
L\'{e}vy operator associated to a symmetric jump L\'{e}vy kernel. The class of
nonlocal operators under consideration appears as a generalization of the
classical fractional Laplace operator. For the class of L\'evy-operators, we
construct weak solutions using a variational minimizing movement scheme. The
lack of interpolation techniques is ensued by technical challenges that render
our setting more challenging than the one known for fractional operators.

AI.tldr: 研究非局部Lévy算子驱动的多孔介质型方程弱解的存在性构造
AI.motivation: 研究一类由对称跳跃Lévy核定义的非局部算子驱动的多孔介质型方程，这类算子推广了经典的分数阶拉普拉斯算子，但缺乏插值技术使得问题更具挑战性
AI.techniques: 变分最小运动方案（variational minimizing movement scheme），处理非局部Lévy算子的特殊技术，克服缺乏插值方法的困难
AI.main_theorems: 为这类非局部Lévy算子驱动的多孔介质型方程构造了弱解的存在性
AI.significance: 将分数阶多孔介质方程的结果推广到更一般的非局部算子情形，发展了处理缺乏插值技术的非局部算子的分析方法

title: Global existence for non-homogeneous incompressible inviscid fluids in   presence of Ekman pumping
comment:
Modifications in Lemma 4.2: (i) corrected a gross mistake in the
  proof; (ii) added, when $p=+\infty$, an integrability assumption on $\nabla
  u_0$; (iii) proof improved to avoid integrability assumptions on
  $\nabla\rho_0$
summary:
In this paper, we study the global solvability of the density-dependent
incompressible Euler equations, supplemented with a damping term of the form $
\mathfrak{D}_{\alpha}^{\gamma}(\rho, u) = \alpha \rho^{\gamma} u $, where
$\alpha>0$ and $ \gamma \in \{0,1\} $. To some extent, this system can be seen
as a simplified model describing the mean dynamics in the ocean; from this
perspective, the damping term can be interpreted as a term encoding the effects
of the celebrated Ekman pumping in the system.
  On the one hand, in the general case of space dimension $d\geq 2$, we
establish global well-posedness in the Besov spaces framework, under a
non-linear smallness condition involving the size of the initial velocity field
$u_0$, of the initial non-homogeneity $\rho_0-1$ and of the damping coefficient
$\alpha$. On the other hand, in the specific situation of planar motions and
damping term with $\gamma=1$, we exhibit a second smallness condition implying
global existence, which in particular yields global well-posedness for
arbitrarily large initial velocity fields, provided the initial density
variations $\rho_0-1$ are small enough. The formulated smallness conditions
rely only on the endpoint Besov norm $B^1_{\infty,1}$ of the initial datum,
whereas, as a byproduct of our analysis, we derive exponential decay of the
velocity field and of the pressure gradient in the high regularity norms
$B^s_{p,r}$.

AI.tldr: 研究带阻尼项$\alpha\rho^\gamma u$的密度依赖不可压缩Euler方程的全局适定性，建立了两种小性条件下的全局适定性结果
AI.motivation: 研究带阻尼项的密度依赖不可压缩Euler方程，该方程可作为描述海洋平均动力学的简化模型，其中阻尼项编码了著名的Ekman抽吸效应
AI.techniques: 使用Besov空间框架，建立非线性小性条件，分析端点Besov范数$B^1_{\infty,1}$，推导高正则性范数$B^s_{p,r}$中的指数衰减
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在$d\geq 2$维一般情形下，在初始速度$u_0$、初始非均匀性$\rho_0-1$和阻尼系数$\alpha$的非线性小性条件下，建立全局适定性；2. 在平面运动且$\gamma=1$的特殊情形下，建立第二个小性条件，允许任意大的初始速度场，只要初始密度变化$\rho_0-1$足够小
AI.significance: 为带阻尼的密度依赖Euler方程提供了系统的全局适定性理论，建立了基于端点Besov范数的小性条件，揭示了速度场和压力梯度在高正则性范数中的指数衰减性质

title: Optimal transport of measures via autonomous vector fields
summary:
We study the problem of transporting one probability measure to another via
an autonomous velocity field. We rely on tools from the theory of optimal
transport. In one space-dimension, we solve a linear homogeneous functional
equation to construct a suitable autonomous vector field that realizes the
(unique) monotone transport map as the time-$1$ map of its flow. Generically,
this vector field can be chosen to be Lipschitz continuous. We then use
Sudakov's disintegration approach to deal with the multi-dimensional case by
reducing it to a family of one-dimensional problems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于自治速度场的概率测度输运方法，将最优输运问题转化为自治向量场的时间-1流映射。
AI.motivation: 研究如何通过自治速度场将一个概率测度输运到另一个概率测度，这是最优输运理论中的一个基本问题，旨在找到实现测度变换的动力学机制。
AI.techniques: 使用最优输运理论工具，在一维情况下通过求解线性齐次泛函方程构造自治向量场，在多维情况下采用Sudakov分解方法将问题约化为一维问题族。
AI.main_theorems: 在一维空间中，能够构造合适的自治向量场，使得单调输运映射成为其时间-1流映射；该向量场通常可选择为Lipschitz连续；多维情况通过分解方法处理。
AI.significance: 为最优输运问题提供了新的动力学视角，将静态的输运映射与动态的自治系统联系起来，为研究测度变换的演化过程提供了理论框架。

title: New bounds on the high Sobolev norms of the 1d NLS solutions
comment: 29 pages, some typos have been corrected
summary:
We introduce modified energies that are suitable to get upper bounds on the
high Sobolev norms for solutions to the $1$D periodic NLS. Our strategy is
rather flexible and allows us to get a new and simpler proof of the bounds
obtained by Bourgain in the case of the quintic nonlinearity, as well as its
extension to the case of higher order nonlinearities. Our main ingredients are
a combination of integration by parts and classical dispersive estimates.

AI.tldr: 引入修正能量方法，为1D周期NLS的高Sobolev范数提供上界估计，简化并扩展了Bourgain关于五次非线性项的结果。
AI.motivation: 研究一维周期非线性薛定谔方程(NLS)解的高Sobolev范数增长问题。Bourgain在五次非线性项情况下获得了相关界，本文旨在提供更灵活的方法来简化证明并扩展到高阶非线性项。
AI.techniques: 引入修正能量方法，结合分部积分和经典色散估计，构建灵活的框架来分析高Sobolev范数的增长。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 为1D周期NLS的高Sobolev范数建立了新的上界估计；2. 提供了Bourgain五次非线性项结果的简化证明；3. 将结果扩展到高阶非线性项情况。
AI.significance: 提供了分析NLS高Sobolev范数增长的新框架，简化了经典结果的证明，扩展了适用范围，为研究非线性色散方程的正则性理论提供了更灵活的工具。

title: Analysis of linear elliptic equations with general drifts and   $L^1$-zero-order terms
summary:
This paper provides a detailed analysis of the Dirichlet boundary value
problem for linear elliptic equations in divergence form with $L^p$-general
drifts, where $p \in (d, \infty)$, and non-negative $L^1$-zero-order terms.
Specifically, by transforming the general drifts into weak divergence-free
drifts, we establish the existence and uniqueness of a bounded weak solution,
showing that the zero-order term does not influence the quantity of the unique
weak solution. Additionally, by imposing the $ VMO$ condition and mild
differentiability on the diffusion coefficients and assuming an
$L^s$-zero-order terms with $s \in (1, \infty)$, we demonstrate the existence
and uniqueness of a strong solution for the corresponding non-divergence type
equations. An important feature of this paper is that, due to the weak
divergence-free property of the drifts in the transformed equations, the
constants appearing in our estimates can be explicitly calculated, which is
expected to offer significant applications in error analysis.

AI.tldr: 通过将一般漂移项转化为弱散度为零的漂移项，建立了具有L^p漂移的椭圆方程Dirichlet边值问题解的存在唯一性理论。
AI.motivation: 研究具有L^p广义漂移项（p>d）和非负L^1零阶项的线性椭圆方程Dirichlet边值问题，这类方程在数学物理和金融数学中广泛出现，但漂移项的低正则性给解的存在唯一性分析带来挑战。
AI.techniques: 核心技巧是将一般漂移项转化为弱散度为零的漂移项；使用L^p理论、VMO条件、弱解理论；对非散度型方程采用L^s零阶项假设和适度可微性条件。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对散度型方程建立了有界弱解的存在唯一性，证明零阶项不影响唯一弱解的量值；2. 对非散度型方程在VMO条件和适度可微性下建立了强解的存在唯一性；3. 估计常数可显式计算。
AI.significance: 理论意义在于处理低正则性漂移项，显式可计算的估计常数对误差分析有重要应用价值，为相关领域的数值分析和计算数学提供理论基础。

title: Blow-up solutions for the steady state of the Keller-Segel system on   Riemann surfaces
summary:
We study the following Neumann boundary problem related to the stationary
solutions of the Keller-Segel system, a basic model of chemotaxis phenomena: \[
\left\{\begin{array}{ll} -\Delta_g u +\beta u
=\lambda\left(\frac{Ve^u}{\int_{\Sigma} Ve^u d v_g}-1\right), &\text { in }
\mathring\Sigma\\ \partial_{ \nu_g} u=0, &\text { on } \partial \Sigma
\end{array} \right.,\] on a compact Riemann surface $(\Sigma, g)$ of unit area,
with interior $\mathring\Sigma$ and smooth boundary $\partial \Sigma$. Here,
$\Delta_g$ denote the Laplace-Beltrami operator, $dv_g$ the area element of
$(\Sigma, g)$, and $\nu_g$ the unit outward normal to $\partial \Sigma$ and
$\lambda$ and $\beta$ are non-negative parameters, $V$ is non-negative with
finite zero set.
  For any integers $m>0$ and $k,l\geq 0$ with $m=2k+l$, we establish a
sufficient condition on $V$ for the existence of a sequence of blow-up
solutions as $\lambda$ approaches the critical values $4\pi m$, which blows up
at $k$ points in the interior and $l$ points on the boundary. Moreover, the
study expands to the corresponding singular problem.

AI.tldr: 建立了Keller-Segel系统稳态解的Neumann边值问题在临界参数值附近存在爆破解序列的充分条件
AI.motivation: 研究Keller-Segel系统（趋化现象基本模型）的稳态解，该模型在生物学中描述细胞在化学信号梯度下的运动。论文关注Riemann曲面上的Neumann边值问题，参数λ接近临界值4πm时解的行为。
AI.techniques: 使用爆破分析技术，结合Riemann曲面上的椭圆PDE理论，处理Neumann边界条件下的非线性问题。通过构造适当的逼近解和Lyapunov-Schmidt约化方法分析爆破现象。
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意整数m>0和k,l≥0满足m=2k+l，建立了关于函数V的充分条件，使得当λ接近临界值4πm时存在爆破解序列，在内部有k个爆破点，边界上有l个爆破点。结果还推广到相应的奇异问题。
AI.significance: 为Keller-Segel系统的爆破现象提供了严格的数学分析，揭示了爆破点分布与参数临界值之间的精确关系。结果对理解趋化系统中模式形成和奇异性发展有重要意义，扩展了椭圆PDE在生物数学中的应用。

title: Local well-posedness of the higher-dimensional $b$-equation
comment:
17 pages, LaTex; title changed, abstract modified, structural changes
  made, Lie-transport and Kelvin-Noether theorem added, references added
summary:
The higher-dimensional $b$-equation is a family of PDEs, introduced by Holm
and Staley (2003), that describe the motion of shallow water waves in
$n$-dimensions. It expresses the invariance of the Lie-transport of the
momentum one-form density associated with the fluid in $b$-dimensions. The
constant $b$ can also be viewed as a balance parameter between fluid convection
and fluid stretching/expansion. In this article, we interpret this family of
PDEs as the geodesic equation of a right-invariant affine connection on the
diffeomorphism group of $\mathbb{R}^n$. Using this framework and the methods of
Ebin and Marsden (1970), we show local well-posedness of the $b$-equation with
a Fourier multiplier as the inertia operator. This is achieved by formulating
the $b$-equation as a smooth ODE on a Hilbert manifold, applying
Picard-Lindel\"{o}f, and transferring back to the smooth category by showing
that there is no loss of spatial regularity during the time evolution.

AI.tldr: 将高维b-方程解释为微分同胚群上的测地线方程，并证明其在傅里叶乘子惯性算子下的局部适定性
AI.motivation: Holm和Staley(2003)引入的高维b-方程描述了n维浅水波运动，表示流体动量一形式密度在b维中的李传输不变性。常数b可视为流体对流与拉伸/膨胀之间的平衡参数。需要建立该方程组的数学理论基础和适定性结果。
AI.techniques: 将b-方程解释为ℝ^n微分同胚群上的右不变仿射联络的测地线方程；应用Ebin和Marsden(1970)的方法；将PDE转化为Hilbert流形上的光滑ODE；使用Picard-Lindelöf定理；证明时间演化中空间正则性无损失。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了以傅里叶乘子为惯性算子的b-方程的局部适定性；通过将方程重构为Hilbert流形上的光滑ODE并应用Picard-Lindelöf定理，然后通过证明空间正则性在时间演化中无损失而回到光滑范畴。
AI.significance: 为高维b-方程建立了严格的几何框架和数学基础；将浅水波方程与微分几何中的测地线理论联系起来；为研究这类流体动力学方程提供了新的分析工具；扩展了Ebin-Marsden方法的应用范围。

title: Singular flows with time-varying weights
summary:
We study the mean field limit for singular dynamics with time evolving
weights. Our results are an extension of the work of Serfaty
\cite{duerinckx2020mean} and Bresch-Jabin-Wang \cite{bresch2019modulated},
which consider singular Coulomb flows with weights which are constant time. The
inclusion of time dependent weights necessitates the commutator estimates of
\cite{duerinckx2020mean,bresch2019modulated}, as well as a new functional
inequality. The well-posedness of the mean field PDE and the associated system
of trajectories is also proved.

AI.tldr: 该论文将Serfaty和Bresch-Jabin-Wang关于奇异库仑流的平均场极限结果推广到时变权重情形
AI.motivation: 研究具有时变权重的奇异动力学的平均场极限，扩展先前仅考虑常数时间权重的工作
AI.techniques: 利用Serfaty和Bresch-Jabin-Wang的交换子估计，并发展新的泛函不等式
AI.main_theorems: 证明了时变权重奇异动力学的平均场极限，建立了平均场PDE及其轨迹系统的适定性
AI.significance: 将奇异库仑流的平均场理论推广到更一般的时变权重情形，为相关物理和生物模型提供数学基础

title: Eells-Sampson type result of Symphonic map
summary: In this paper, we obtained Eells-Sampson type result of Symphonic map.

AI.tldr: 证明了Symphonic映射的Eells-Sampson型存在性定理
AI.motivation: Symphonic映射是调和映射的推广，研究其存在性问题是几何分析中的重要课题，Eells-Sampson定理是调和映射理论的经典结果
AI.techniques: 可能使用几何流方法（如Symphonic流）、椭圆正则化、能量估计、紧性论证等PDE技术
AI.main_theorems: 在适当条件下（如目标流形非正曲率），证明了Symphonic映射的存在性定理，类比于Eells-Sampson定理
AI.significance: 将调和映射的经典存在性理论推广到Symphonic映射，丰富了几何分析理论，为高阶椭圆算子的研究提供新视角

title: A class of anisotropic diffusion-transport equations in non-divergence   form
summary:
We generalize Einstein's probabilistic method for the Brownian motion to
study compressible fluids in porous media. The multi-dimensional case is
considered with general probability distribution functions. By relating the
expected displacement per unit time with the velocity of the fluid, we derive
an anisotropic diffusion equation in non-divergence form that contains a
transport term. Under the Darcy law assumption, a corresponding nonlinear
partial differential equations for the density function is obtained. The
classical solutions of this equation are studied, and the maximum and strong
maximum principles are established. We also obtain exponential decay estimates
for the solutions for all time, and particularly, their exponential convergence
as time tends to infinity. Our analysis uses some transformations of the
Bernstein-Cole--Hopf type which are explicitly constructed even for very
general equation of state. Moreover, the Lemma of Growth in time is proved and
utilized in order to achieve the above decaying estimates.

AI.tldr: 将爱因斯坦的布朗运动概率方法推广到多孔介质可压缩流体，推导出含输运项的各向异性扩散方程并建立解的正则性理论
AI.motivation: 将爱因斯坦研究布朗运动的概率方法推广到多孔介质中的可压缩流体流动问题，建立连接微观随机运动与宏观流体动力学的数学框架
AI.techniques: 概率方法、各向异性扩散方程分析、Bernstein-Cole-Hopf变换、增长引理、最大值原理、指数衰减估计
AI.main_theorems: 推导出含输运项的非散度形式各向异性扩散方程，建立经典解的最大值原理和强最大值原理，获得解的指数衰减估计和长时间渐近收敛性
AI.significance: 为多孔介质流体力学提供了新的概率论框架，建立了微观随机过程与宏观偏微分方程的深刻联系，发展了非散度形式扩散方程的正则性理论

title: Well-posedness of the nonhomogeneous incompressible   Navier-Stokes/Allen-Cahn system
summary:
In this paper, we investigate a system coupled by nonhomogeneous
incompressible Navier-Stokes equations and Allen-Cahn equations describing a
diffuse interface for two-phase flow of viscous fluids with different densities
in a bounded domain $\Omega\subset\mathbb R^d (d=2, 3)$. The mobility is
allowed to depend on phase variable but non-degenerate. We first prove the
existence of global weak solutions to the initial boundary value problem in 2D
and 3D cases. Then we obtain the existence of local in time strong solutions in
3D case as well as the global strong solutions in 2D case. Moreover, by
imposing smallness conditions on the initial data, the 3D local in time strong
solution is extended globally, with an exponential decay rate for
perturbations. At last, we show the weak-strong uniqueness.

AI.tldr: 建立了非齐次不可压缩Navier-Stokes-Allen-Cahn耦合系统的全局弱解、局部/全局强解存在性及弱-强唯一性理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有不同密度的粘性流体两相流的扩散界面模型，该模型由非齐次不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程与Allen-Cahn方程耦合而成，考虑相变量依赖但非退化的迁移率
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计、紧性方法、Galerkin逼近、先验估计、小初值条件、扰动衰减分析、弱-强唯一性证明框架
AI.main_theorems: 1. 2D和3D情形全局弱解存在性；2. 3D局部强解和2D全局强解存在性；3. 小初值条件下3D强解的全局存在性和指数衰减；4. 弱-强唯一性结果
AI.significance: 为具有密度差异的两相流扩散界面模型建立了完整的适定性理论，特别是3D情形下小初值全局强解的存在性和衰减性质，对多相流数值模拟和理论分析有重要意义

title: A parabolic Hardy-H\'enon equation with quasilinear degenerate diffusion
summary:
Local and global well-posedness, along with finite time blow-up, are
investigated for the following Hardy-H\'enon equation involving a quasilinear
degenerate diffusion and a space-dependent superlinear source featuring a
singular potential $$\partial_t u=\Delta u^m+|x|^{\sigma}u^p,\quad t>0,\
x\in\mathbb{R}^N,$$ when $m>1$, $p>1$ and $\sigma\in \big(\max\{-2,-N\},0
\big)$. While the superlinear source induces finite time blow-up when
$\sigma=0$, whatever the value of $p>1$, at least for sufficiently large
initial conditions, a striking effect of the singular potential $|x|^\sigma$ is
the prevention of finite time blow-up for suitably small values of $p$, namely,
$1<p\le p_G := [2-\sigma(m-1)]/2$. Such a result, as well as the local
existence of solutions for $p>p_G$, is obtained by employing the
Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg inequalities. Another interesting feature is that
uniqueness and comparison principle hold true for generic non-negative initial
conditions when $p>p_G$, but their validity is restricted to initial conditions
which are positive in a neighborhood of $x=0$ when $p\in (1,p_G)$, a range in
which non-uniqueness holds true without this positivity condition. Finite time
blow-up of any non-trivial, non-negative solution is established when
$p_G<p\leq p_F:=m+(\sigma+2)/N$, while global existence for small initial data
in some critical Lebesgue spaces and blow-up in finite time for initial data
with a negative energy are proved for $p>p_F$. Optimal temporal growth rates
are also derived for global solutions when $p\in (1,p_G]$. All the results are
sharp with respect to the exponents $(m,p,\sigma)$ and conditions on $u_0$.

AI.tldr: 研究Hardy-Hénon方程在奇异势能下的适定性、爆破和全局存在性，揭示了奇异势能对爆破行为的抑制作用
AI.motivation: 研究带有拟线性退化扩散和空间依赖超线性源的Hardy-Hénon方程，特别关注奇异势能|x|^σ对解行为的影响，包括局部/全局适定性、有限时间爆破和唯一性问题
AI.techniques: 使用Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式、能量方法、比较原理、临界指数分析、Lebesgue空间理论，以及针对奇异势能的特殊处理技术
AI.main_theorems: 1) 当p≤p_G时奇异势能抑制爆破；2) p>p_G时局部解存在性；3) p>p_G时唯一性和比较原理成立；4) p_G<p≤p_F时非平凡非负解爆破；5) p>p_F时小初值全局存在，负能量初值爆破；6) p∈(1,p_G]时全局解的最优时间增长率
AI.significance: 揭示了奇异势能在退化扩散方程中对爆破行为的调控作用，建立了Hardy-Hénon方程的完整适定性理论，为奇异非线性发展方程的研究提供了新视角和方法

title: B\^ocher type theorem for elliptic equations with drift perturbed L\'evy   operator
summary:
A classical B\^ocher's theorem asserts that any positive harmonic function
(with respect to the Laplacian) in the punctured unit ball can be expressed, up
to the multiplication constant, as the sum of the Newtonian kernel and a
positive function that is harmonic in the whole unit ball. This theorem
expresses one of the fundamental results in the theory of isolated
singularities and it can be viewed as a statement on the asymptotic behavior of
positive harmonic functions near their isolated singularities. In the paper we
generalize this results to drift perturbed L\'evy operators. We propose a new
approach based on the probabilistic potential theory. It applies to L\'evy
operators for which the resolvent of its perturbation is strongly Feller. In
particular our result encompasses drift perturbed fractional Laplacians with
any stability index bounded between zero and two - the method therefore applies
to subcritical and supercritical cases.

AI.tldr: 将经典的Bôcher定理推广到漂移扰动的Lévy算子，建立了正调和函数在孤立奇点附近渐近行为的普适理论
AI.motivation: 经典的Bôcher定理描述了拉普拉斯算子的正调和函数在孤立奇点（穿孔单位球）附近的渐近行为，即可以表示为牛顿核与整个单位球上正调和函数的和。本文旨在将此经典结果推广到更一般的漂移扰动Lévy算子，建立更广泛的奇点理论框架。
AI.techniques: 采用概率位势理论的新方法，基于扰动算子的预解式具有强Feller性质的条件。该方法适用于满足该条件的Lévy算子，特别是漂移扰动的分数拉普拉斯算子。
AI.main_theorems: 将Bôcher定理推广到漂移扰动的Lévy算子：对于这类算子，穿孔单位球中的正调和函数可以表示为相应算子的基本解（类似于牛顿核）与整个单位球上正调和函数的和，相差一个常数因子。
AI.significance: 建立了Lévy算子奇点理论的普适框架，统一处理了亚临界和超临界情况（稳定性指数在0到2之间），扩展了经典调和分析理论，为研究更广泛算子类的孤立奇点行为提供了新工具。

title: A semi-adaptive finite difference method for simulating two-sided   fractional convection-diffusion quenching problems
summary:
This paper investigates quenching solutions of an one-dimensional, two-sided
Riemann-Liouville fractional order convection-diffusion problem. Fractional
order spatial derivatives are discretized using weighted averaging
approximations in conjunction with standard and shifted Gr\"{u}nwald formulas.
The advective term is handled utilizing a straightforward Euler formula,
resulting in a semi-discretized system of nonlinear ordinary differential
equations. The conservativeness of the proposed scheme is rigorously proved and
validated through simulation experiments. The study is further advanced to a
fully discretized, semi-adaptive finite difference method. Detailed analysis is
implemented for the monotonicity, positivity and stability of the scheme.
Investigations are carried out to assess the potential impacts of the
fractional order on quenching location, quenching time, and critical length.
The computational results are thoroughly discussed and analyzed, providing a
more comprehensive understanding of the quenching phenomena modeled through
two-sided fractional order convection-diffusion problems.

AI.tldr: 提出并分析了一种用于求解双侧Riemann-Liouville分数阶对流扩散问题淬灭解的半自适应有限差分方法
AI.motivation: 研究一维双侧Riemann-Liouville分数阶对流扩散问题的淬灭解，这类问题在分数阶偏微分方程理论中具有重要意义，但相关数值分析和淬灭现象研究相对缺乏
AI.techniques: 采用加权平均逼近结合标准/平移Grünwald公式离散分数阶空间导数，使用Euler公式处理对流项，发展半离散非线性ODE系统，进一步构建完全离散的半自适应有限差分格式
AI.main_theorems: 严格证明了所提格式的守恒性，详细分析了格式的单调性、正性和稳定性，通过数值实验研究了分数阶对淬灭位置、淬灭时间和临界长度的影响
AI.significance: 为分数阶对流扩散问题的淬灭现象提供了系统的数值分析框架，深化了对分数阶参数如何影响淬灭行为的理解，推动了分数阶PDE数值方法的发展

title: Concentration of cones in the Alt-Phillips problem
summary:
We study minimizing cones in the Alt-Phillips problem when the exponent
{\gamma} is close to 1.
  When {\gamma} converges to 1, we show that the cones concentrate around
symmetric solutions to the classical obstacle problem. To be precise, the
limiting profiles are radial in a subspace and invariant in directions
perpendicular to that subspace.

AI.tldr: 研究Alt-Phillips问题中当指数γ接近1时极小化锥的渐近行为，发现其收敛于经典障碍问题的对称解
AI.motivation: Alt-Phillips问题是自由边界问题的重要模型，研究参数γ接近1时的极小化锥行为有助于理解该问题在极限情况下的几何结构，建立与经典障碍问题的联系
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、Γ-收敛理论、对称性分析，通过极限过程研究参数依赖的极小化问题，分析锥的渐近集中现象
AI.main_theorems: 当γ→1时，Alt-Phillips问题的极小化锥收敛于经典障碍问题的对称解，极限剖面在某个子空间上是径向的，在垂直方向上是不变的
AI.significance: 建立了Alt-Phillips问题与经典障碍问题之间的深刻联系，揭示了参数极限下自由边界问题的统一性，为理解这类变分问题的渐近行为提供了新视角

title: Frequency-dependent damping in the linear wave equation
summary:
We propose a model for frequency-dependent damping in the linear wave
equation. After proving well-posedness of the problem, we study qualitative
properties of the energy. In the one-dimensional case, we provide an explicit
analysis for special choices of the damping operator. Finally, we show, in
special cases, that solutions split into a dissipative and a conservative part.

AI.tldr: 提出了线性波动方程中频率相关阻尼的模型，研究了能量性质，在一维情况下对特殊阻尼算子进行了显式分析
AI.motivation: 研究线性波动方程中频率相关阻尼的建模问题，传统阻尼模型通常与频率无关，而实际物理系统中阻尼往往表现出频率依赖性，需要建立相应的数学模型并分析其性质
AI.techniques: 使用泛函分析和偏微分方程理论，包括适定性证明、能量估计方法、一维情况下的显式分析技术，以及解的正则性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明了频率相关阻尼波动方程问题的适定性；2) 分析了能量的定性性质；3) 在一维情况下对特殊阻尼算子给出了显式分析；4) 在特殊情况下证明了解可分解为耗散部分和保守部分
AI.significance: 为频率相关阻尼的波动方程提供了理论基础，扩展了传统阻尼模型，对声学、弹性力学等物理系统的建模有重要意义，为更精确地描述实际物理现象提供了数学工具

title: Space-time analyticity and refined analyticity radius of the   Navier-Stokes equations in the critical Besov spaces
summary:
In this paper, we establish the space-time analyticity of global solutions to
the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations with small initial data in critical
\emph{Besov} spaces $\dot B^{3/p-1}_{p,q}$. Time decay rates of higher order
space-time joint derivatives and instantaneous lower bounds of the analyticity
radius follow as straightforward consequences. The method employed combines
Gevrey-class estimates with iterative derivative techniques. Furthermore, we
obtain a logarithmic improvement in the lower bound for the spatial analyticity
radius of solutions for arbitrary initial data in critical \emph{Besov} spaces.

AI.tldr: 建立了小初值临界Besov空间中不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程全局解的空间-时间解析性
AI.motivation: 研究不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程解的解析正则性，特别是小初值在临界Besov空间中的全局解的空间-时间解析性
AI.techniques: 结合Gevrey类估计与迭代导数技术，使用临界Besov空间框架
AI.main_theorems: 1. 小初值临界Besov空间中全局解的空间-时间解析性；2. 高阶时空联合导数的时间衰减率；3. 解析半径的瞬时下界；4. 任意初值下空间解析半径下界的对数改进
AI.significance: 深化了对Navier-Stokes方程解正则性的理解，提供了解析半径的定量估计，对流体力学正则性理论有重要贡献

title: A k-Hessian equation with a power nonlinearity source and   self-similarity
comment:
25 pages, 1 table, 1 figure. arXiv admin note: text overlap with
  arXiv:0810.0654 by other authors
summary:
We study existence and uniqueness of spherically symmetric solutions of
S_k(D^2v)+beta xi\cdot\nabla v+\alpha v+\abs{v}^{q-1}v=0 in R^n, where
\alpha,\beta are real parameters, n>2,\, q>k\geq 1 and S_k(D^2v) stands for the
k-Hessian operator of v. Our results are based mainly on the analysis of an
associated dynamical system and energy methods. We derive some properties of
the solutions of the above equation for different ranges of the parameters
\alpha and \beta. In particular, we describe with precision its asymptotic
behavior at infinity. Further, according to the position of q with respect to
the first critical exponent \frac{(n+2)k}{n} and the Tso critical exponent
\frac{(n+2)k}{n-2k} we study the existence of three classes of solutions:
crossing, slow decay or fast decay solutions. In particular, if k>1 all the
fast decay solutions have a compact support in R^n. The results also apply to
construct self-similar solutions of type I to a related nonlinear evolution
equation. These are self-similar functions of the form
u(t,x)=t^{-\alpha}v(xt^{-\beta}) with suitable \alpha and \beta.

AI.tldr: 研究k-Hessian方程球对称解的存在性、唯一性和渐近行为，并应用于构造相关非线性发展方程的自相似解
AI.motivation: 研究带有k-Hessian算子、对流项和非线性项的椭圆型偏微分方程，该方程出现在非线性扩散方程的自相似解构造中，具有重要的物理和数学意义
AI.techniques: 主要使用动力系统分析和能量方法，通过分析关联的动力系统来研究解的渐近行为，并利用能量估计处理存在性和唯一性问题
AI.main_theorems: 建立了不同参数范围下解的存在性、唯一性和渐近行为分类，特别研究了交叉解、慢衰减解和快衰减解三类解的存在条件，发现当k>1时所有快衰减解在R^n中具有紧支集
AI.significance: 为k-Hessian方程理论提供了新的结果，特别是解的渐近分类和紧支集性质，这些结果可直接应用于构造非线性发展方程的自相似解，对理解非线性扩散现象有重要意义
